---
title: "Lesson 3: A Confidence Interval for a Ratio of Variances"
subtitle: "Statistical Estimation for Data Science and AI"
---


::: {.column-margin}
{{< video 01_a-confidence-interval-for-a-ratio-of-variances.mp4 >}}

:::

## Slides

## Reflection
